title: Chain-D1 beta reversion: (HYPE,BTC) break, no flow evidence
claim: Correlation between HYPE and BTC broke (rho=0.000, roll_mean=0.000, break_score=0.000).  KG path traversal found no aggression bursts or funding extremes for either asset; divergence consistent with transient beta noise → mean reversion expected.
mechanism: Absence of flow causation (no aggression edges with is_burst=True, no exhibits_funding edges with is_extreme=True) means the break is not anchored to an economic event.  The common factor (beta) reasserts.
